Voice Controlled Wheelchair.title: Voice Controlled Wheelchair
Voice Controlled Wheelchair.description: Prototyped a semi autonomous wheelchair that included obstacle detection, LiDAR, and speech commands

Voice Controlled Browser Agent.title: Voice Controlled Browser Agent
Voice Controlled Browser Agent.description: Developed a voice controlled browser agent for the blind that included a websocket for concurrent communication of commands between front and back end, Google Gemini API integration, and touchless page navigation

Autonomous Bug Killing Robot.title: Autonomous Bug Killing Robot
Autonomous Bug Killing Robot.description: Currently building an autonomous bug killing robot using a Raspberry Pi, camera, and custom computer vision model to identify and eliminate bugs in a designated area

Polyhedral Order Book.title: Polyhedral Order Book
Polyhedral Order Book.description: Traditional central limit order books only match orders in pairs, which causes wide spreads, cold-start problems for new trading pairs, and prevents correlated assets from being quoted directly against each other. This is a C++ implementation of a polyhedral order book that lets each order span any number of assets and uses linear programming to find matching cycles whose net inventory is non-negative across every asset. Based on Jacob Jackson's 2023 paper.
